details: The agent navigated to the correct Wikipedia page, used JavaScript to extract data from the wikitable, and correctly reported all laureates for the 3 most recent years (2025: John Clarke, Michel H. Devoret, John M. Martinis; 2024: John J. Hopfield, Geoffrey Hinton; 2023: Pierre Agostini, Ferenc Krausz, Anne L'Huillier) including all co-winners. The data was extracted from the actual page, not hallucinated.
